data.name: Production - SubTask Due date approaching copy

parameters.subject: =SubTask Due Reminder (24 Hours): {{$json.subtask_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.responsible_person_firstname}} {{$json.responsible_person_lastname}},

This is a reminder that the subtask {{$json.subtask_title}} is due within the next 24 hours.

Task Schedule

Subtask Title {{$json.subtask_title}}
Subtask Created On {{$json.subtask_created_on}}
Subtask End On {{$json.subtask_end_on}}
Current Status {{$json.subtask_status}}
Responsible Owner {{$json.responsible_person_firstname}} {{$json.responsible_person_lastname}}
Parent Task {{$json.parent_task_title || 'N/A'}}
Project {{$json.project_title}}
Milestone {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Task Link View Task Details

Please prioritize completion or update the task with revised timelines if required.

Regards,
Task Management System

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id AS subtask_id,
  ANY_VALUE(t.title) AS subtask_title,
  ANY_VALUE(t.created_at) AS subtask_created_on,
  ANY_VALUE(t.target_date) AS subtask_end_on,
  ANY_VALUE(t.status) AS subtask_status,
  ANY_VALUE(t.priority) AS subtask_priority,

  ANY_VALUE(
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(
      HOUR,
      UTC_TIMESTAMP(),
      t.target_date
    )
  ) AS hours_remaining,

  ANY_VALUE(rp.id) AS responsible_person_id,
  ANY_VALUE(rp.firstname) AS responsible_person_firstname,
  ANY_VALUE(rp.lastname) AS responsible_person_lastname,
  ANY_VALUE(rp.email) AS responsible_person_email,

  ANY_VALUE(parent_t.id) AS parent_task_id,
  ANY_VALUE(parent_t.title) AS parent_task_title,

  ANY_VALUE(pm.id) AS project_id,
  ANY_VALUE(pm.title) AS project_title,

  ANY_VALUE(m.id) AS milestone_id,
  ANY_VALUE(m.title) AS milestone_title,

  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.id ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.firstname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.lastname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.email ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_emails

FROM task_managements t

JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN task_managements parent_t
  ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = parent_t.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = COALESCE(t.project_management_id, parent_t.project_management_id)

LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  t.status NOT IN ('completed', 'closed')
  AND t.target_date > UTC_TIMESTAMP()
  AND t.target_date <= UTC_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 40 HOUR
  AND t.parent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND rp.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84)

GROUP BY t.id;

SELECT
  -- =========================
  -- SUBTASK
  -- =========================
  t.id                    AS subtask_id,
  t.title                 AS subtask_title,
  t.created_at            AS subtask_created_on,
  t.target_date           AS subtask_end_on,
  t.status                AS subtask_status,
  t.priority              AS subtask_priority,

  TIMESTAMPDIFF(
    HOUR,
    UTC_TIMESTAMP(),
    t.target_date
  )                       AS hours_remaining,

  -- Responsible person
  rp.id                   AS responsible_person_id,
  rp.firstname            AS responsible_person_firstname,
  rp.lastname             AS responsible_person_lastname,
  rp.email                AS responsible_person_email,

  -- =========================
  -- PARENT TASK
  -- =========================
  parent_t.id             AS parent_task_id,
  parent_t.title          AS parent_task_title,

  -- =========================
  -- PROJECT (from self OR parent)
  -- =========================
  pm.id                   AS project_id,
  pm.title                AS project_title,

  -- =========================
  -- MILESTONE (via parent task)
  -- =========================
  m.id                    AS milestone_id,
  m.title                 AS milestone_title

FROM task_managements t

-- responsible person
JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- parent task
LEFT JOIN task_managements parent_t
  ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id

-- milestone via parent
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = parent_t.milestone_id

-- project via self or parent
LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = COALESCE(t.project_management_id, parent_t.project_management_id)

WHERE
  t.status NOT IN ('completed', 'closed')
  AND t.target_date > UTC_TIMESTAMP()
  AND t.target_date <= UTC_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 40 HOUR
  AND t.parent_id IS NOT NULL;  -- only subtasks

parameters.html:
=

Dear {{ $json.observer_first_name }} {{ $json.observer_last_name }},

Task Schedule

Subtask Created On {{$json.subtask_created_on}}
Subtask End On {{$json.subtask_end_on}}

Regards,
